experiment: B26: B2 + CEMIA-lite final-stage boundary/uncertainty gate
note: B26 keeps B2 boundary/rim auxiliary supervision and RBSG-lite unchanged. It adds a final-stage CEMIA-inspired gate after RBSG-lite and before the final mask/boundary/rim heads. The gate uses pre-boundary and pre-mask uncertainty cues only; it does not add pre-mask supervision, rim suppression, a second decoder, or a new loss.

cemia_lite.position: after RBSG-lite, before final mask/boundary/rim heads
cemia_lite.inputs: RBSG-refined feature, pre-boundary logits, pre-mask logits
